=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/nestedPipe.ts(5,24): suggestion TS377015: Chained pipe calls can be simplified to a single pipe call. effect(unnecessaryPipeChain)
/.src/nestedPipe.ts(11,24): suggestion TS377015: Chained pipe calls can be simplified to a single pipe call. effect(unnecessaryPipeChain)
/.src/nestedPipe.ts(19,24): suggestion TS377015: Chained pipe calls can be simplified to a single pipe call. effect(unnecessaryPipeChain)
/.src/nestedPipe.ts(20,3): suggestion TS377015: Chained pipe calls can be simplified to a single pipe call. effect(unnecessaryPipeChain)


==== /.src/nestedPipe.ts (4 errors) ====
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    import { pipe } from "effect/Function"
    
    // Nested pipe calls - inner pipeable in outer pipe
    export const result1 = pipe(
                           ~~~~~
      Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map((n) => n + 1)),
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
      Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    )
    ~
!!! suggestion TS377015: Chained pipe calls can be simplified to a single pipe call. effect(unnecessaryPipeChain)
    
    // Nested pipe calls - inner pipe in outer pipeable
    export const result2 = pipe(
                           ~~~~~
      Effect.succeed(1),
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
      Effect.map((n) => n + 1)
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    ).pipe(
    ~~~~~~~
      Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    )
    ~
!!! suggestion TS377015: Chained pipe calls can be simplified to a single pipe call. effect(unnecessaryPipeChain)
    
    // Triple nesting
    export const result3 = pipe(
                           ~~~~~
      Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map((n) => n + 1)).pipe(Effect.delay(1000)),
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377015: Chained pipe calls can be simplified to a single pipe call. effect(unnecessaryPipeChain)
      Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    )
    ~
!!! suggestion TS377015: Chained pipe calls can be simplified to a single pipe call. effect(unnecessaryPipeChain)
